## Description

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
What should happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Environment
- **Device**: [e.g., iPhone 12, Desktop Windows 11]
- **Browser**: [e.g., Chrome, Safari]
- **OS**: [e.g., iOS, Windows]
- **Role**: [e.g., Seller, Buyer, Admin]

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots.

## Error Message

Paste error message or logs here
